data.title: Viridian Therapeutics beats Q2 estimates with $(1.00) loss per share and $75,000 sales. CEO upbeat about future plans.
data.description: Viridian Therapeutics, Inc. shared positive news for the second quarter, as revealed on Wednesday. The company recorded a quarterly loss of $(1.00) per share, surpassing analyst expectations of $(1.02) per share. Furthermore, quarterly sales amounted to $75.000 thousand, exceeding analysts' projected $43.643 thousand. The company's President and CEO, Steve Mahoney, highlighted the recent Breakthrough Therapy Designation for Veligrotug and its impressive performance in pivotal clinical trials. This success underscores Viridian's progression towards the anticipated BLA filing and upcoming commercial launch. Additionally, the company is advancing well in commercial readiness efforts, aiming to be launch-ready upon a Priority Review designation.

data.title: J-Star Holding closed over-allotment option, selling 187,500 shares at $4/share in IPO, raising $5.75M in total proceeds.
data.description: In Taichung City, Taiwan, on August 7, 2025, J-Star Holding Co., Ltd. revealed the closure of the sale of an additional 187,500 ordinary shares, part of its initial public offering. The shares were sold at the IPO price of $4.00 per share, generating aggregate gross proceeds of $5,750,000. This total includes the initial IPO proceeds of $5,000,000. J-Star is a prominent provider of carbon fiber and composite solutions for various sectors like personal sports equipment, healthcare products, automobile parts, resin systems, and research and development services.
NYMEX Natural Gas September futures settle at $3.0670/MMBtu.
NYMEX WTI Crude September futures settle at $63.88 a barrel, down 47 cents, 0.73%.

data.title: Zaxbys opens first location in Phoenix, Arizona on Aug 13, 2025, expanding its footprint out West.
data.description: Starting on August 13th, Zaxby's, the renowned chicken chain, will bring its popular Chicken Fingerz™ and Signature Zax Sauce® to the desert as it opens its first Phoenix, Arizona location. This expansion represents the company's ongoing growth out West. The new location will offer the brand's classic menu items and renowned sauces to customers in the Phoenix area.

data.title: MoonPay partners with Mercury app to provide on/off ramps and swaps for decentralized trading on Hyperliquid.
data.description: The launch of Mercury Beta introduces MoonPay's on/off ramps and swaps on Hyperliquid, allowing access to decentralized trading. Recently in New York, the strategic alliance between MoonPay and Mercury has been confirmed. This partnership provides a mobile-centric entry point to the Hyperliquid platform, facilitating easy access for users. The exchange platform now enables users to engage in decentralized trading through the integration of MoonPay's services. This integration also serves as a gateway for users to partake in various offerings on the Hyperliquid platform.

data.title: Consumers Energy, subsidiary of CMS Energy, declares quarterly dividend on preferred stock, payable Oct. 1, 2025.
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan on August 7th, 2025, the Board of Directors at Consumers Energy, a subsidiary of CMS Energy, announced a quarterly dividend for their preferred stockholders. The upcoming dividend is set to be paid out on October 1st, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded at the end of...

data.title: Wix.com reported Q2 revenue of $489.93 million, exceeding estimates. Adjusted EPS of $2.28 beat, and 2025 revenue outlook revised to $1.975-$2.000 billion.
data.description: Wix.com Ltd. (NASDAQ: WIX) exceeded expectations with their second-quarter results, reporting a 12% year-over-year revenue increase to $489.93 million. This figure surpassed the analyst consensus of $487.47 million. Additionally, their adjusted EPS of $2.28 outperformed the expected $1.74. The company expressed confidence in continued growth for the remainder of 2025 due to a stable economic environment. They highlighted strong momentum in their core business, supported by new cohort performance and expansion into a new market through the acquisition of Base44. Wix.com adjusted its fiscal 2025 revenue forecast to a range of $1.975 billion to $2.000 billion.

data.title: DraftKings stock falls despite beating Q2 revenue estimates with $1.51B, EPS at 38 cents vs. 12 cents. Maintains full-year guidance of $6.2-6.4B revenue.
data.description: DraftKings Inc (NASDAQ: DKNG) shares saw a decline in trading on Thursday following the release of their second-quarter financial results. Initially, the shares rose after the report, but eventually turned negative. DraftKings reported second-quarter revenue of $1.51 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $1.39 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the same period were 38 cents per share, also exceeding estimates of 12 cents per share. The company confirmed its full-year revenue guidance to be between $6.2 billion and $6.4 billion, compared to the estimated $6.28 billion. Additionally, DraftKings maintained its full-year Adjusted EBITDA forecast of $800 million.

data.title: Keller Logistics Summit in 2025 aims to provide industry insights for supply chain planning in 2026.
data.description: Keller Logistics Group, based in Defiance, Ohio, has announced its dedication to providing practical solutions, forward-thinking trends, and operational knowledge that will benefit the industry as a whole. Amidst significant fluctuations in freight costs, demand shifts, and planning precision, the company aims to address these challenges.

data.title: Rural Voice's 4th season will address topics including immigration, health care, mental health, tribal rights in MN. Events to be held in 4 cities in September 2025. Coverage by Minnesota Public Radio.
data.description: In September 2025, discussions will take place in Cloquet, Willmar, Wadena, and Owatonna as part of the Rural Voice town hall series. These events aim to amplify voices from Greater Minnesota. Minnesota Public Radio will broadcast the conversations. The series is set to feature a diverse range of topics and engage community members in meaningful dialogue. The events will provide a platform for residents to discuss important issues affecting their communities, with scheduled dates for each location to be announced soon.

data.title: Stock market sees Dow and S&P 500 losses, Nasdaq loses gains, gold stock breaks out. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: During Thursday afternoon trading, buying activity increased significantly for the Dow and the S&P 500. A particular gold company's stock experienced a breakout. The Dow Jones Industrial Average saw mounting losses while the Nasdaq surrendered its gains. This live coverage highlights the recent movements in the stock market.

data.title: Magnite, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGNI) reported Q2 earnings of 20 cents per share, exceeding the estimate of 17 cents. Sales hit $173.332M, surpassing the estimate of $157.227M. Analysts raise forecasts.
data.description: Magnite, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGNI) exceeded expectations in the second quarter earnings report. The company posted earnings of 20 cents per share, surpassing the anticipated 17 cents per share by analysts. Their quarterly sales tallied up to $173.332 million, also exceeding the projected $157.227 million. Despite ongoing macroeconomic uncertainties, Magnite is optimistic about the growth in the second half of 2025 in both CTV and DV+. They attributed their success to increased partnerships, expanding advertiser base, and playing a crucial role in the market. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Survey by PasswordManager.com finds 40% of workers use former employers' passwords for personal use due to lax security.
data.description: Former employees are able to access old accounts due to weak security measures, as revealed in a recent study by PasswordManager.com. The survey focused on U.S. workers' practices with workplace passwords. Published on August 7, 2025, the report highlighted the concerning trend of lax password security.

data.title: Removery study finds picosecond laser safe for removing newly inked tattoos within 14 days.
data.description: In a pioneering pilot study conducted in Austin, Texas on August 7, 2025, Removery has challenged traditional advice regarding tattoo regret. The research showed that utilizing a picosecond laser to remove newly inked tattoos within 14 days of application can be effective. This new approach aims to address accelerated tattoo regret, providing individuals with a potential solution to their concerns. The study's findings may revolutionize the tattoo removal industry and offer a different perspective on handling fresh tattoos.

data.title: PREP Securities in Utah hires 2 senior sales pros to distribution team, managing selling group of third-party.
data.description: In Park City, Utah on August 7, 2025, PREP Securities, LLC, the broker-dealer connected to PREP Property Group, revealed the inclusion of two experienced sales experts to its securities distribution team. Handling the selling group of external parties, the firm looks to enhance its operations with the new additions.

data.title: France sees 64% increase in luxury hotel bookings this July, with top cities being Paris, Nice, and Marseille.
data.description: In France, there has been a significant 64% increase in luxury hotel bookings compared to last year. The cities of Paris, Nice, and Marseille are at the forefront of this surge. This data comes from Global Travel Collection (GTC) for the month of July. France is experiencing a notable tourism boost this summer, with a significant rise in the number of visitors choosing to stay in luxury accommodations.
